summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Avantra Chemicals multipage website - NEW FEATURES iteration. All 42 backend API tests passed (22 original + 20 new). All frontend features tested including new Settings management, Jobs CRUD, Job Applications, Careers page, Terms/Privacy/Corporate pages, and Phytocode section on homepage.

issues: Jobs shown have TEST_ prefix from automated tests - consider cleanup

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding a cleanup endpoint or script to remove TEST_ prefixed jobs and applications after testing
Social media icons in footer only appear when URLs are set in settings - good conditional rendering
seed_data_creation: Test jobs and applications created during backend tests (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working. Settings API updates hero_image, logo_url, about_image, phytocode_image, and social_links. Jobs CRUD working with active/inactive status. Job applications accept base64 file uploads for photo, resume, and payslip. Careers page shows only active jobs. Language switcher works across all pages including new ones.

homepage_phytocode_section.details: New Phytocode section displays with content, benefits cards, and technology image

admin_settings_tab.details: Settings tab allows updating hero_image, logo_url, about_image, phytocode_image URLs and social media links (YouTube, Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn)

admin_jobs_tab.details: Jobs tab allows creating, editing, and deleting job postings with active/inactive status

admin_applications_tab.details: Applications tab shows job applications with status badges, can view full details with file attachments

careers_page.details: Displays active job listings with department, location, type. Shows 'No open positions' when no active jobs exist

job_detail_page.details: Shows job info (title, department, location, salary, requirements, responsibilities) and application form

job_application_form.details: Form accepts name, email, phone, address, current company, CTC, and file uploads for photo, resume (required), payslip (optional)

terms_page.details: Terms & Conditions page loads at /terms with all sections (Acceptance, Products, Usage, etc.)

privacy_page.details: Privacy Policy page loads at /privacy with all sections (Information Collection, Usage, Security, Rights)

corporate_page.details: Corporate page loads at /corporate with company overview, stats, addresses, and registration info

navbar_careers_link.details: Navbar includes Careers link that navigates to /careers

footer_links.details: Footer includes working links to Terms, Privacy, and Corporate pages

language_switcher.details: Language switcher works across all pages including new ones (EN/TE/KN/HI)

endpoints_tested: GET /api/stats - Stats now includes open_positions count
